title: FINITEX Blue Nitrile Disposable Gloves, 3.5mil, L, 100pcs, Powder-Free & Latex-Free Food Grade Medical Exam Cleaning Tattoo Nitrile Gloves
features: [Perfect Fit & suitable thickness] FINITEX disposable nitrile gloves fit your hands perfectly and provide maximum comfort. With the elastic wrist bands and elastic palms, you can easily put on and take off

[Excellent Features & Durability] FINITEX powder-free nitrile gloves are convenient, waterproof, oil-proof, chemical-resistant, puncture-resistant, stretchable and tear-resistant. Our gloves are thicker than most gloves on the market, and providing excellent durability and dexterity

[Versatile & safe] FINITEX nitrile Examination gloves meet food-grade standards and are suitable for various occasions. Whether it's car washing, kitchen, cleaning, gardening, painting, hair dye, janitorial, Tattoo, laundry or laboratory work
[Powder-Free & Latex-Free] FINITEX multipurpose disposable gloves are completely free from powder and natural rubber latex. Our gloves can effectively protect your hands

[Finger Textured & Ambidextrous] With a practical and professional design, the textured grips on the fingers provides a better grip, ensuring you can perform delicate and precise work with ease whether wet or dry
description: Product Description Latex-Free Made of 100% high-quality nitrile, non-toxic, harmless and odorless Acid-Resistant, Alkali-Resistant, Oil-resistant, Chemical-Resistant High elasticity, Comfortable, and Fit Powder-Free Easy to take on and take off, sensitive and easy to operate, touchable screen Micro rough surface, improving anti slip performance Anti-static Comfortable Excellent elasticity provides comfort and flexibility for your hands. Anti-slip & Durable Thicker than most gloves on the market Fingertip texture Puncture-resistant & Anti slip Multi-purpose Medical care, Dental clinics, Medical testing, Laboratories, Beauty salons, tattoos, Pet care, House cleaning, Food prep, Equipment maintenance, Precision instrument operation Food use & Medical use & Industrial use Effectively and professionally protect your hands, keeping them clean and dry.
